inputs.name: Zoho Mail domain verification TXT value
inputs.instructions: In the Zoho Mail Admin Console, go to Domains > [your domain] > Domain Verification and copy the full TXT record value shown.

inputs.name: Zoho Mail DKIM record hostname
inputs.instructions: In the Zoho Mail Admin Console, go to Domains > [your domain] > Email Configuration > DKIM and copy the hostname shown (e.g. zmail._domainkey).

inputs.name: Zoho Mail DKIM TXT value
inputs.instructions: In the Zoho Mail Admin Console, go to Domains > [your domain] > Email Configuration > DKIM and copy the TXT value shown.

inputs.name: Zoho Mail region
inputs.instructions: Your Zoho datacenter region (global or eu). Check your Zoho Mail URL — mail.zoho.eu = eu, otherwise global.
